basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) Project Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 15-05-2026 on the official website of ACTREC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ACTREC Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc/ B.Pharm (PG Diploma In Clinical Research is Mandatory) or equivalent qualification.
qualification.details: Project Coordinator: B.Sc/ B.Pharm (PG Diploma In Clinical Research is Mandatory) or equivalent qualification.
